title: Homicides of Black people represent 77% of all murders in Brazil, Atlas of Violence reports

posts.instagram: A staggering 77% of homicides in Brazil are of Black people, according to the Atlas da Violência 2026 report. This statistic highlights a concerning trend in the country. Read more at the source story #Brazil #HateCrime #ViolenceReport #RacialInjustice #CrimeStatistics
posts.x: 77% of homicides in Brazil are of Black people, report finds
posts.threads: The Atlas da Violência 2026 report reveals a stark reality in Brazil, where 77% of homicides are of Black people. This statistic demands attention and action. #Brazil #HateCrime #RacialInjustice
posts.tiktok: A 30-second video explaining how a recent report found that nearly 8 out of 10 murder victims in Brazil are Black, and what this says about violence in the country

title: Traffickers Exploit War Zones to Drive Illicit Drug Use - Africa Defense Forum

posts.instagram: Traffickers are exploiting war zones to increase illicit drug use, with devastating consequences for local communities. According to the Africa Defense Forum, this has led to a significant rise in drug related problems. Read the full story at Africa Defense Forum #Global #DrugUse #WarZones #Trafficking #Exploitation
posts.x: Traffickers exploit war zones to increase illicit drug use, leading to devastating consequences
posts.threads: The exploitation of war zones by traffickers has led to a significant increase in illicit drug use, causing widespread harm to communities. This issue requires urgent attention and action. #DrugUse #WarZones #Global
posts.tiktok: A 30 second video explaining how traffickers take advantage of war zones to spread illicit drugs and exploit vulnerable communities, as reported by Africa Defense Forum

title: UNODC’s World Drug Report 2025: Global instability and the diversification of drug markets in West and Central Africa deepens health and security risks

posts.instagram: The World Drug Report 2025 reveals a significant shift in the drug landscape of West and Central Africa, with the region now a major hub for cocaine and methamphetamine trafficking, posing serious health and security risks. Read more at the original source. #Global #Healthcare #DrugReport #Africa
posts.x: West and Central Africa are now major hubs for cocaine and methamphetamine trafficking, says the World Drug Report 2025
posts.threads: The World Drug Report 2025 highlights a rapidly evolving drug landscape in West and Central Africa, posing serious health and security risks. The region is now a major hub for cocaine and methamphetamine trafficking. #Global #Healthcare
posts.tiktok: The World Drug Report 2025 explains how West and Central Africa have become major drug trafficking hubs in just a few years
